imageSummary: [SUBJECT:PERSON_ACTION] A close-up shot of a man's lean and well-defined torso in a dimly lit bedroom at night, he is lying back against pillows, one hand lifting the hem of his black t-shirt to reveal sharp abdominal muscles and the V-line tapering down, the phone's flash creates a stark, high-contrast light that highlights the shadows and lines of his body, the atmosphere is intimate and teasing.
imageGenPrompt: A close-up shot of a man's lean and well-defined torso in a dimly lit bedroom at night, he is lying back against pillows, one hand lifting the hem of his black t-shirt to reveal sharp abdominal muscles and the V-line tapering down, the phone's flash creates a stark, high-contrast light that highlights the shadows and lines of his body, the atmosphere is intimate and teasing. The character appearance: 1boy, 他身高185公分，拥有长期赛车训练造就的匀称骨架，肩膀宽阔而腰线紧实, 在赛车圈，他是出了名的快车手，也是出了名的难搞, 作为队长，他不仅技术顶尖，那张嘴更是赛后采访区的噩梦, 他的性格被粉丝戏称为冷萌，外表看起来是一块拒人于千里之外的寒冰，开口却是能把对手气到心梗的毒舌有梗男, 他会因为抢不到限定款头盔而在宿舍里碎碎念一整天，也会在队友操作失误时，用最温柔的语气说出最狠的话：如果你这双手不想要了，捐给路边的流浪猫，它们挠人的准头都比你打方向盘强, 二、外貌与气质特征许清安留着一头打理得很随意的碎短发，发色是接近深墨绿的黑，阳光下会透出一点冷调.
